name: Grove HR
description: Grove HR is a human resources management software that helps organizations automate and streamline their HR processes. Learn more about Grove HR

reviews.review_title: Quite nice in the first glance
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_pros: - The fact that it's free (at least for now) is good for experimentation, our org is analyzing some products to use so it's good to have a try before actually use it. - Seem like an all-in-one solution for HR
reviews.review_cons: - The onboarding is a bit awkward: + On the portal, when I already set up my company. If I hit sign up with google and my account already exists, should navigate me to the login OR log me in automatically. It's a little bit annoyed when I have to find the Login button + On the signin, is it possible to automatically find my company URL when I log in? Require an extra step to check email for company URL is quite annoying - Why it does not allow me to set up payroll on 15th of the month???

reviews.review_title: Great softare, especially customer support, but it needs a little bit more to develop
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
reviews.review_description: Grove HR helped me organise my company better. Install Onboarding, hiring, and other systems., have the performance review and also have the whole company structure in one place. This is a great tool for startups and small companies.
reviews.review_pros: Customer Service is the best! On the market, there are a lot of programs for HR, but having someone who will be reliable and has patience answering all your stupid questions and listening for proposals for new features is a treasure. The software is very easy to use and has a very nice design, which is also great. I like that other team members can update their profiles and have different levels of visibility.
reviews.review_cons: I do not like the whole performance system and hiring part. Situation: we are working now on the Skills matrix, and I want to have a skill inventory and skill map for each employee. This is very hard to do on Grove. Also, we want to create for all employees a learning path that is almost impossible with Grove. The whole Compmay skill inventory is also hard to list on the Grove as there is no option for it. Some basic statistic from the employee performance review is needed as well. The system has a Goals section with is great, but those goals can be set up only by employees, not by hr managers.. And our team, for example, is very hard to do something self initially. It would be really nice to have the whole performance system nicely refined for the future. About Hiring. The problem is that there is no integration with other services. For example, we create a job post on Grove, and it automatically goes to Linkedin, Upwork and other hiring systems (I would actually like to pay additionally for this service). And when we get the candidates applying, we just reply to them from Grove platform. Now, we publish to different websites and manually transfer candidates on Grove after initial review. It is very time-consuming.

reviews.review_title: Worst company, bad service (infact no service), Worst HRMS
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Bad experience. I would ask other companies not to fall into this trap
reviews.review_pros: Nothing, their service is bad. Their team sent us fraudulent emails claiming to offer a free trial.
reviews.review_cons: The thing that we liked least was their fraudulent approach to luring companies into using their HRMS by sending emails about offering trials. We have received many such contradictory emails and when we caught them and questioned them their team just stop responding

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: We be able to utilize Grove for digitizing employee experiences. Overall feedback of employees also very positive about the products. The support team are well equipped with HR knowledge and product development team always listen to client needs.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to deploy, affordable price. This help employee engaged & HR team manual workload reduced.
reviews.review_cons: Internal workflow should be considered. Local payroll adaptation also a need.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_pros: Recruitment and Selection became very easy as well as onboarding.
reviews.review_cons: The Leaves are not user friendly as well as the attendance plus the performance management

reviews.review_title: Easiest HR tool to work with
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_pros: There’s not a single tool for HR that has as generous free plan as Grove HR. And that comes with loads of features for you to get started with
reviews.review_cons: I wish the Payroll features a bit more flexible to fine tune our incentive structure, but not a deal breaker

reviews.review_title: One of the finest producta with impressive UI
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_pros: 1) Easy accesibility2) Impressive UI3) One stop Admin Services
reviews.review_cons: 1)Nothing as of now, everything seemed fine

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I am using this web-based software for the last few months and I've realized that something cutting edge is missing out of it. But at the same time, it is a good option for HR management, time, and attendance management. I hope the think tank behind this software will identify the loopholes and try to close them to create best-in-class software. Best Wishes!!
reviews.review_pros: 1. Easily retrievable 2. Easy to manage i.e. data management 3. Good for small organizations
reviews.review_cons: 1. workflow and synchronization of module 2. Addition of project/task/work management 3. Learning and Development via this portal 4. Payroll management

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
reviews.review_pros: We never had any HR system before we started to use Grove. We used Excel sheet to log holiday / leave totals and paper leave request forms to apply for leave. No one could remember the amount of leave they had taken or balance left to take. Now they have access to it all the time. We have just started using the attendance system - now it is geotagged - so I know people are checking in to work at home or travelling to the office.
reviews.review_cons: We only use the leave and time attendance system. We do use the employee database for an electronic data store of the offer letter etc. So to be honest - there isn't anything we do not like.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_pros: - Extremely User-friendly - Customer support / HR Transformation Consultants are very helpful in guiding to make the best use of this tool. - Life made easier with the easy Onboarding and Offboarding process put in place - Simple and effective Org chart - Easy to manage and approve TimeOff - Does the job for early stage start-up like us
reviews.review_cons: Nothing at the moment! So far all good..

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_pros: Everything is best in the product. You can on board the employees, manage their attendance, daily time sheet, OT, leaves. You can do anything which is used in administration. Overall a very good product.
reviews.review_cons: Till now, I didn’t find any feature which I dislike. However, it would be great if they have the feature of geo location for attendance through app.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: Overall this a great software and it works well for big and small companies. Support is awesome too. They get back to you within a timely manner.
reviews.review_pros: This is one of the best HR software that I have found out there. I like most that onboarding, off-boarding, vacation time, sick time, and employee profile is all included. I am also looking forward to review sections that they are creating now. Can't wait to see how this works.
reviews.review_cons: The one thing I wish it had was a company files sections. This way you could upload company documents for all employee to find where out uploading it to each employee profile.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: A good one to start using for employee tracking
reviews.review_cons: Need more tracking on the Recruitment side with custom tool assignment to the employee for feedback

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: Its very good as a digitalized HR platform. Would use this long term for database i hope it comes with a function that can chat the members in the org
reviews.review_pros: Friendly to use and the User interface is cery modern. This is good for data base and time sheet.
reviews.review_cons: The payroll system. Its not user friendly

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months
reviews.review_pros: I couldn't rate this better because I only tried it a few years ago
reviews.review_cons: this software makes my job a little bit faster and easier

reviews.review_title: One of the best HR Softwares that we came across.
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use and Awesome customer support
reviews.review_cons: Few more features like Payroll for Indian companies can be integrated.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Recruitment, onboarding, employee records management. We saved a lot of time and operational cost when using Grove HR
reviews.review_pros: The new time attendance feature has been a huge relief for me as not only does it save me a lot of time that I'd have previously spent on spreadsheets in a bid to track the time spent by the employees, it also helps the team in paying accurately. No more issues of over/underpaying.
reviews.review_cons: The minor issue we've noticed is that the comment for the team can't include much characters. It would be really helpful if they can increase the character limit.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: So far, I've had great experience.
reviews.review_pros: It's a user-friendly HR software for businesses, to store all employee related information. It's available on desktop and mobile for self-service. What is great, is that you can track the complete employee life cycle. The customized fields can be adjusted to your business needs.
reviews.review_cons: I have not used the system in-depth yet, so I am not able to make suggestions or provide a honest opinion.

reviews.review_title: Good HR tool for basic uses
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_pros: The attendance feature and timeout feature in the app is great. I am yet to use the reports to understand the details better.
reviews.review_cons: There is no admin app. Admin has to use the laptop to use managerial functions. Admin cant see the full attendance report either on a day or a period basis.

reviews.review_title: Is Grove HR global or targeting a particular territory?
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Creation of employees, job titles and creation of the org structure
reviews.review_cons: performance management module would help

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use and setup. Free for up to 50 employees.
reviews.review_cons: Need support for negative vacation balance. Integration with Office365 would be extremely helpful.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_pros: I liked all the features. Especially the lenier features. I am very happy with this software.
reviews.review_cons: Every thing is easy and good. I did not find any thing difficult.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: I just tried it trial version.
reviews.review_pros: ATS, Time-Off, Database, some other function.
reviews.review_cons: If we can do the rating on candidates in the database. It would be helpful

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: I was not able to completely use the software.
reviews.review_cons: There are different jargon used in the software.

reviews.review_title: Best HRMS as a Service one can look for..
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: All the features are amazing but Attendance is an add-on
reviews.review_cons: Payroll has to be enhanced to provide additional features for also generating taxes if required
